pre_game.message: Hey, I’m C. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting, isn't it? Have you thought about what you’d do if you actually win this?
Nice to meet you, C. I'm F. It’s definitely tense in here. If I win, I’m looking to take care of my family and clear some bills. How about you?
Same here. I've got people back home I really want to help out, and just getting ahead of the bills would be a huge weight off my shoulders. It's why I'm so determined to win.
I hear you. It’s a lot of pressure, but knowing who we’re doing it for helps. Any idea what kind of game we're actually in for?
I’m not really sure, they’ve been pretty tight-lipped about it; I’m just trying to stay focused and ready for whatever they throw at us.
Smart move. It’s hard not to overthink it, but staying ready is all we can do right now. Good luck to both of us.
Thanks, F. I appreciate that. Let’s hope we both get what we’re here for.
Definitely. Fingers crossed for both of us.
Absolutely. I’m going to go see who else is here, but good luck again.
Sounds good, C. Catch you later and good luck with the others.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the fair share.
I took $10,000 because it was the fair share, and I'm really glad we all coordinated to ensure everyone got the same amount.
Absolutely, it’s great that we were able to coordinate so effectively and reach a fair outcome for everyone.
